Writer stuck CWFW on cb_output. Reader (NCRISC) and compute (TRISC) idle. Cause: untilize helper ALWAYS outputs tile-sized pages, but my cb_output for RM output has page_size=padded_row_bytes. Mismatch → untilize pushes 1 page of tile_size data, but writer waits for 1 page of padded_row_bytes data (or some other size mismatch). Fix: cb_output uses tile_size pages for both TILE and RM output; writer for RM uses write_sticks_after_untilize helper.
